title: athyrium acrostichoides
intro: Athyrium acrostichoides, also known as the American lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Athyrium acrostichoides include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, lower fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
